items.title: Speed Up
items.description: Clean old downloads, system cache, browser cache, and recycle bin with one click. Runs all cleanup tasks automatically.

items.title: Cache Cleaner
items.description: Safely clean system and app cache files. Gain gigabytes of space.

items.description: Clean Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Safari cache with one click.

items.title: Recycle Bin

items.description: Flush your DNS cache to fix connection issues and speed up browsing.

items.title: Startup Manager
items.description: Manage programs that launch with your computer. Reduce boot time.

items.title: System Health Score
items.description: Rate your computer's overall health out of 100. See what you can improve.

items.description: Scan your drives for empty folders cluttering your file system. Clean them up in one click.

items.title: File Shredder
items.description: Securely delete sensitive files with military-grade overwriting (DoD 5220.22-M). Unrecoverable.

items.title: RAM Optimizer

items.title: Service Manager
items.description: Control Windows services that slow down your system. Disable unnecessary background services.

items.title: Privacy Report

items.title: Unused App Detector
items.description: Find applications you haven't used in months. Uninstall them to free up space.

items.title: Visual Duplicate Finder

items.title: Disk Health Monitor
items.description: Check SSD/HDD health with SMART data. Monitor drive temperature and lifespan.

pricing.title: Simple & Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscription, no hidden fees. Pay once, use forever.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions here

items.question: Is Disk Mop safe?
items.answer: Yes, Disk Mop is 100% safe. It contains no viruses, malware, or adware. It doesn't touch system files, only detects and cleans unnecessary files (cache, temp files, duplicates). It shows you every file before deletion and waits for your confirmation.

items.question: Which operating systems are supported?
items.answer: Disk Mop supports Windows 10/11 (64-bit) and macOS 12+ (Apple Silicon and Intel). It's developed as a native application for both platforms.

items.question: How does the license work?
items.answer: Pay $9.90 once for lifetime access. 1 license = 1 computer. No subscription, no extra charges. If you change computers, you can transfer your license to the new one.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: You make a one-time payment through Polar.sh's secure payment infrastructure. Credit cards and other payment methods are supported.

items.question: Are updates free?
items.answer: Yes, all updates and new features are free for life. You can receive automatic updates from within the app.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Disk Mop works entirely locally. Your files are never sent to any server. Internet connection is only used for license verification and updates. All scanning and cleaning operations happen on your computer.

items.question: Does it conflict with antivirus software?
items.answer: No, Disk Mop is fully compatible with all major antivirus software (Windows Defender, Avast, Kaspersky, Norton, etc.). It's a digitally signed secure application.

items.question: Is Linux supported?
items.answer: Currently Windows and macOS are supported. Linux support is on our roadmap. Subscribe to our newsletter to follow developments.

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.content: Disk Mop ("we", "our", "the application") is a desktop disk cleanup and optimization tool developed by Lova Software. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your information.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data We Do Not Collect
dataCollection.content:
Disk Mop operates entirely on your local computer. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of the following:

• Personal files, documents, photos, or videos
• File names, folder names, or directory structures
• Browsing history or browser data
• Passwords, credentials, or financial information
• System configuration or hardware identifiers
• Usage patterns or behavioral analytics within the app

All scanning, analysis, and cleaning operations are performed locally on your device. No file data ever leaves your computer.

localStorage.title: 3. Data Stored Locally
localStorage.content:
Disk Mop stores the following data locally on your device:

• License key and activation status (encrypted)
• Application preferences (language, theme, settings)
• Scheduled cleanup configurations

This data is stored in your system's application data directory and is never transmitted to external servers except as described in Section 4.

internetUsage.title: 4. Internet Connectivity
internetUsage.content:
Disk Mop uses an internet connection only for the following purposes:

• License validation: Your license key is verified against our licensing server (api.diskmop.com) to confirm its validity. Only the license key is transmitted — no personal data, file information, or system details are sent.
• Automatic updates: The application checks for new versions via GitHub Releases and downloads updates when available.

No other network communication occurs during normal operation.

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content:
• Polar.sh: If you purchase a license, payment is processed through Polar.sh. Polar.sh handles all payment data (credit card information, billing address) according to their own privacy policy. We do not store or have access to your payment details.
• GitHub: Application updates are hosted on GitHub Releases. GitHub's privacy policy applies to the download of update files.
• Google Analytics: Our website (diskmop.com) uses Google Analytics to understand website traffic. This does not apply to the desktop application itself.

analytics.title: 6. Website Analytics
analytics.content: Our website at diskmop.com uses Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics such as page views, geographic region, and referral sources. This data helps us improve our website. You can opt out of Google Analytics by using browser extensions or cookie settings. The desktop application does not include any analytics or telemetry.

children.title: 7. Children's Privacy
children.content: Disk Mop is a general-purpose utility application. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. Since the application does not collect personal data, there are no age-specific data concerns.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the application after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: diskmopdev@gmail.com
Website: https://diskmop.com
Developer: Lova Software — https://lovasoftware.com
